questions.q: According to April 20, 2026 news reports, President Trump is pushing to fast-track research into which psychedelic drug for mental health treatments?
On April 20, 2026, scientists revealed a new plant-based serum derived from Centella asiatica that is proven in clinical tests to significantly boost hair density and regrow hair in how many weeks?

In late April 2026, experts noted that San Francisco is experiencing high levels of multiple viruses, including a gastrointestinal illness whose rise is partly blamed on recent changes to HHS vaccination recommendations. Which virus is it?

A study highlighted on April 20, 2026, found that popular AI chatbots are giving users potentially dangerous medical advice, frequently offering non-scientific alternatives to what common cancer treatment?
On April 20, 2026, pharmaceutical giant Eli Lilly agreed to a deal worth up to $7 billion to acquire which clinical-stage biotechnology company focused on in vivo CAR-T therapy?
